title: Systematic pre-annotation explains the "dark matter" in LC-MS metabolomics.
author: Chi Y Mitchell JM Zheng S Li S
content: S-EPMC11838597 PMC11838597 Systematic pre-annotation explains the "dark matter" in LC-MS metabolomics. The majority of features in global metabolomics from high-resolution mass spectrometry are typically not identified, referred as the "dark matter". Are these features real compounds or junk
